pin-action-sha.description: All external marketplace actions must be pinned to an immutable full-length commit SHA rather than tags or branches.

pin-setup-actions-sha.description: Setup actions (actions/setup-python, actions/setup-node, actions/setup-go, actions/setup-java) must be pinned to a commit SHA.

pin-artifact-actions-sha.description: Artifact and cache actions (actions/upload-artifact, actions/download-artifact, actions/cache) must be pinned to a commit SHA.

reusable-workflow-pinned.description: Reusable workflow calls (uses: org/repo/.github/workflows/*.yml@ref) must be pinned to a commit SHA.

coverity-scan.description: Coverity SAST and secrets scanning should be configured for repository code.

image-build-jfrog.description: Workflow must configure building and pushing Docker images to the JFrog Artifactory registry.

image-signing.description: Container images pushed to JFrog registry must be signed using Cosign.

bdba-scan.description: Black Duck Binary Analysis (BDBA) vulnerability scans should execute on container images pulled from the JFrog registry.

residual-gitlab-vars.description: Workflows must not contain legacy GitLab CI variables (e.g., $CI_PROJECT_NAME, $CI_COMMIT_SHA) inside shell steps.

explicit-artifact-transfer.description: Dependent jobs (defined in needs) requiring compiled outputs must use explicit actions/upload-artifact and actions/download-artifact steps.

unbound-secrets.description: Passwords, keys, or tokens used in shell scripts must be bound to env properties referencing secrets.<NAME>.

runner-shell-misalignment.description: Jobs targeting Windows or macOS runners must specify the correct shell for the commands used.

multiline-block-scalar.description: Multi-line run commands should use literal block scalars (|) rather than folded block scalars (>).

job-dependency-cycle.description: Circular dependency definitions in job 'needs' trees are forbidden.

unresolved-needs.description: Job 'needs' references must resolve to a job defined in the same workflow. Typos or missing jobs cause silent failures.

least-privilege-token.description: Limit GITHUB_TOKEN scope by setting 'permissions: {}' at the top-level workflow or job configuration.

job-permission-escalation.description: Job-level permissions must not widen the workflow-level GITHUB_TOKEN scope beyond the declared default.

oidc-cloud-deploy.description: Cloud deployment jobs using OIDC-based authentication (aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials, azure/login) should declare permissions: id-token: write.

checkout-persist-credentials.description: actions/checkout should set persist-credentials: false to prevent token leakage to post-checkout steps.

checkout-fetch-depth.description: actions/checkout should set fetch-depth: 0 when full git history is required for audit or changelog workflows.

job-timeout-missing.description: Jobs should declare timeout-minutes to prevent hung builds from consuming runner resources.

step-timeout-missing.description: Long-running run: steps should declare timeout-minutes to prevent indefinite hangs.

latest-runtime-version.description: Runtime versions should not be set to 'latest' or 'lts/*' (non-reproducible). Pin to a specific major/minor.

runner-version-pinned.description: runs-on should use a pinned version (e.g. ubuntu-22.04) instead of 'latest' for reproducibility.

deprecated-set-output.description: Deprecated workflow commands (::set-output, ::set-env, ::add-path) must be replaced with env files.

untrusted-input-injection.description: Writing untrusted input to $GITHUB_ENV or $GITHUB_OUTPUT without sanitization enables injection attacks.

submodule-recursive.description: actions/checkout with submodules: recursive pulls arbitrary submodules and may expose secrets.

concurrency-control.description: Configure concurrency groups on deployment or state-modifying pipelines to avoid execution collisions.
